task_description: I have a RAG answer and its source chunks. I want a 0-1 faithfulness score and to see every claim's verdict, not just the problems.
Just show me which parts of this generated answer are made up or contradicted by the sources -- I don't need a full report, just the problems.
I retrieved 10 chunks for a query and I have a list of which chunk ids are actually relevant. Compute precision, recall, and NDCG at k=5.
I don't have gold relevant docs for this query, but I want to know how good my retrieval ranking is anyway.
I have two different RAG answers to the same question and I want to know which one is better and why.
I want to batch-evaluate 50 question/answer/source triples I have inline and get an aggregate faithfulness score.
Earlier I ran a full evaluation suite and got back a report id. Now I want to pull up the full details of that report.
Check if this answer hallucinated anything relative to the docs it cited -- I just want the fix-it list.
Score how faithful this chatbot's answer is to the knowledge base articles it used, and show me every claim it made.
My vector search returned these chunks in ranked order with known relevant ids -- how good is the ranking quality at several cutoffs?
A/B test: which of these two prompt templates produces a more complete and relevant answer for this query?
I have a dataset of eval cases in a JSONL file on disk -- run the full eval suite over it and give me a summary.
